page: OVHcloud l40s-180 is a GPU-accelerated server powered by an AMD EPYC 9124 processor with 30 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 180 GB of system memory, providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the system is equipped with two NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 96 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface provides a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong compute and memory capabilities. The AMD EPYC CPU achieves strong single-core and multi-core performance in stress-ng tests, alongside a strong Passmark CPU score of 57,957.13. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is highly efficient at 3,994.74 GB/sec, though large-block read and write speeds fall into the average tier. Notably, the dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs deliver top-tier performance in LLM inference benchmarks, processing 13,577.25 tokens per second for small models and maintaining 15.56 tokens per second for text generation on large 70B models.

From a resource density perspective, the combination of dedicated AMD EPYC cores, high-speed NVMe storage, and dual enterprise-grade GPUs offers a balanced hardware profile for compute-intensive workloads. The server is optimized for high-throughput tasks such as large language model inference, machine learning training, data science pipelines, and database operations, as evidenced by its strong performance in Redis and Passmark database benchmarks.
description: The OVHcloud l40s-180 is a dedicated GPU-accelerated server designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features an AMD EPYC 9124 processor with 30 physical cores running at 2.75 GHz, paired with 180 GB of system memory and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Acceleration is driven by two NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier performance in large language model inference, achieving high token-processing speeds across small, medium, and large models. It also exhibits strong CPU performance in multi-threaded decompression and database operations. This hardware profile makes the l40s-180 highly suitable for machine learning, LLM deployment, data science, and high-performance database applications.
og_description: OVHcloud l40s-180 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 30 AMD EPYC cores, 180 GB RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and two NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM for high-performance AI and database workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud l40s-180 is a GPU-accelerated server with 30 AMD EPYC cores, 180 GB RAM, and dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB VRAM for AI and compute tasks.
tagline: A dual-GPU accelerated server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and NVMe storage for high-throughput AI inference and database workloads.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM for accelerated computing.
30 dedicated AMD EPYC 9124 physical cores running at 2.75 GHz.
180 GB of system memory and 400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
Top-tier LLM inference performance across small, medium, and large models.
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization.
Well-suited for machine learning, database operations, and data science.
